plugins.name: AJAZZ AKP05
plugins.description: Device driver for the AJAZZ AKP05, AKP05E, and AKP05E Pro macro pads — 10 LCD keys, 4 encoders, touch strip.
plugins.author: lucatescari

plugins.name: Hello World
plugins.description: Example plugin — shows desktop notifications when keys are pressed. A reference implementation for plugin authors.
plugins.author: lucatescari

plugins.name: Starter Profiles
plugins.description: Example profile pack — a productivity layout and a media controller layout. A reference for profile plugin authors.
plugins.author: lucatescari

plugins.name: Windows Audio Mixer
plugins.description: Control per-app audio volumes from your deck. Press to mute, rotate encoder to adjust volume.
plugins.author: lucatescari
